post.message: Team, we've been discussing ways to increase engagement with second-hand buyers of our EVs. I believe leveraging Automotive Cloud's vehicle tracking capabilities could be a significant step forward. However, we currently lack a systematic way to track the ownership changes among our second-hand buyers. Thoughts?

John, you're absolutely right. We do have a gap in our data collection when it comes to second-hand buyers. As of now, we don't have any system integrated with U.S. DMV databases to track vehicle ownership changes. This makes identifying and reaching out to second-hand buyers quite challenging through our current channels.

Thanks for confirming, Emily. We definitely need to consider a solution that helps us track these changes and engage with the second-hand buyers more effectively. Let's explore how we can leverage Automotive Cloud in this regard.
Hi team, let's not forget about the quarterly market trends presentation next week. I expect everyone to be prepared with their respective slides.
Sure, John. I will share the latest updates on competitors' marketing strategies. I'll also need some data from the sales team.
Reminder - we have a meeting with the technical team tomorrow to discuss the new customer service platform. Please come with your feedback and suggestions.
Emily, let's set up a meeting to discuss the data you need. Also, how is the preparation for the annual automotive trade show coming along?
Jane, I have been reviewing the features of the new platform and I think it could really help us improve our response times. Looking forward to the meeting tomorrow.
John, the trade show preparation is going well. We are finalizing the list of products for display. Let's discuss more in our meeting.
Emily, glad to hear your feedback on the new platform. Let's discuss more in the meeting tomorrow. We need to make sure it's well integrated with our current systems.
Looking forward to our meeting, Emily. Let's ensure we make a strong impact at the trade show this year.
